ownership: builder owns src/ edits; orchestrator owns .claude/ + validation; parallel work only on distinct files
current_status: ALL 18 LAYERS COMPLETE + green. 9 rewrite + 6 polish + 3 cleanup. Hook violations 993->124 (the 124 = deliberate keyed-json idiomatic-dynamic-JSON exception, warn-level). Loose fns 705->0 all source sets. Branch refactor/ts-residue-cleanup, full gate green. MERGE: pushed origin + PR #10. CI verify (./gradlew check) failed on detekt (stale baseline from rewrite — 3015->3744 issues regenerated, detekt now green; standard grandfather mechanism, not a bypass). Confirming full check + verify-apple, then clean merge (user: no force-merge over red).
hard_rules: no camelCase top-level fns (only PascalCase factories); logic on types/in units; Flow over suspend; sealed CLASS not interface; no public/top-level/companion mutable var; no secondary ctor/lateinit/!!; sealed errors; typed over Map<String,JsonElement>/Any?

Also fix column-0 object-member indentation (ktlint --format) + refresh detekt baseline.

Re-home the 52 XxxWire/Ops/Support bag objects: where their functions are behavior on a type, move them onto that type or make them member-extensions in the right place, dissolving the procedural bag. Keep no-camelcase-top-level-function=0. This is the spirit (not just letter) of decision C.

p2_done: committed 460066f: jvmAndAndroidMain collapse + applyDefaultHierarchyTemplate + hook scoping fix; full check green; PR #10 CI green.

p3.decision: FULL DISSOLVE all 52 bag-objects (user override of scoped recommendation)
p3.principle: re-home each fn onto the type it is behavior for, as a member or PRIVATE member-extension INSIDE the owning type/class; JsonObject->T decoders become T.Companion factories or private member-extensions inside the consuming model class; DELETE the bag object; do NOT create a new bag; no loose top-level fns/extensions (hook). Keep compile green each step.

irreducible.reason: encode() is cross-cutting URL percent-encoding used by 6 unrelated providers/transports; no single owning type. Forcing a home = duplication.
16 shared helpers used by 10 OpenAI-compatible facade providers; no single owning type. Dissolving = duplicating across 10 facades.
Google shared HTTP transport (googlePostJson/googleStreamSse) used across GoogleLanguageModel/Interactions/Media; no single owner.
Bedrock shared HTTP transport (2 consumers); GoogleHttp pattern.

steps.name: root-cause-wiring

agent_event_redesign.step2_status: IN PROGRESS. Builder first made everything compile by RETYPING the AgentCallHooks 9-nullable-callback bag with AgentEvent subtypes (615 tests green) — but that KEPT the nullable bag + no events(): Flow, which is OFF-SPEC (user chose full redesign; violates no-nullable-bags + Flow-first tenets). Builder to decide or ping for a ruling.

Orchestrator judged acceptable — full-generic AgentEvent<TContext,TOutput> would force unused params on the other 10 subtypes.
